name: Tuna Fish with Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and shred the tuna fish.
2. Brown the shredded tuna in cooking oil.
3. Peel the tomatoes and cook until soft.
4. Rub through a sieve to remove seeds and excess liquid.
5. Cook spaghetti in boiling salted water until tender, then drain.
6. Combine the fish, tomatoes, pepper, parsley, and spaghetti in a pan.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Heat thoroughly before serving. Serves 6.
